title: View my own worktime confirmations

posts.author: Matthias1 (Matthias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello everyone,

i’m a newbie in monday and currently struggling with the usage: I’m working in multiple projects (each with an own workspace) on multiple tasks. On this tasks i’m tracking my worktime.

Now my question: Is it possible to get a chart for a overview about all my worktime confirmations? Something linke this:

Thanks and Regards
Matthias
